# Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)

Index of ADRs in this repo, grouped by category. Each ADR is a single decision with its context, consequences, and citations. ADRs are kept flat and numbered sequentially; this index is the navigational view.

## All ADRs (chronological)

| ID | Title | Status | Categories | Date |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [0001](0001-iac-terraform-with-avm.md) | IaC is Terraform, anchored on Azure Verified Modules | accepted | foundation, infrastructure | 2026-04-26 |
| [0002](0002-observability-otel-first.md) | Observability is OpenTelemetry-first, emission target is configuration | accepted | observability | 2026-04-26 |
| [0003](0003-modules-ship-policy-and-monitoring.md) | Modules ship their own policy and monitoring | accepted | foundation, governance | 2026-04-26 |
| [0004](0004-composition-by-output-data.md) | Composition is by output data; no orchestrator modules | accepted | foundation, architecture | 2026-04-26 |
| [0005](0005-observability-substrate-and-signal-parity.md) | Centralized observability substrate with federated curation; signal parity across environments | accepted | observability | 2026-04-26 |
| [0006](0006-service-discovery-three-layers.md) | Service discovery as three concerns with three tools | accepted | networking, integration | 2026-04-26 |
| [0007](0007-change-as-code.md) | Change management as code; break-glass is documented | accepted | process, security, governance | 2026-04-26 |
| [0008](0008-audit-before-deny-policy-lifecycle.md) | Audit-before-Deny policy lifecycle; exemptions are first-class | accepted | security, governance | 2026-04-26 |
| [0009](0009-secrets-ephemeral-by-default.md) | Secrets are ephemeral by default; static secrets are documented exceptions | accepted | security | 2026-04-26 |
| [0010](0010-tag-taxonomy.md) | Tag taxonomy is small, mandatory, vocabulary-controlled, operational | accepted | foundation, governance | 2026-04-26 |
| [0011](0011-module-manifest.md) | Module manifest as the structured contract for every module | accepted | foundation, architecture, ai | 2026-04-26 |
| [0012](0012-collaborative-design.md) | Collaborative design — practices that prevent design-in-vacuum | accepted | process, culture | 2026-04-26 |
| [0013](0013-platform-metrics-and-dora.md) | Platform health is measured; DORA is the starting frame | accepted | observability, change-management, governance | 2026-04-27 |
| [0014](0014-slos-as-a-discipline.md) | SLOs are a per-workload discipline; the platform provides the framework, not the targets | accepted | observability, governance | 2026-04-27 |
| [0015](0015-disaster-recovery-and-business-continuity.md) | Disaster recovery is per-workload; the platform provides the primitives | accepted | governance, security, foundation | 2026-04-27 |
